dialogue:
[A] Do you like Iron Man
[B] Sure do! Robert Downey Jr. is a favorite.
[A] Yes i like him too did you know he also was in Zodiac a crime fiction film.
[B] I like crime fiction! Didn't know RDJ was in there. Jake Gyllenhaal starred as well.
[A] So he did he also starred in End of Watch have you ever seen that movie?
[B] Yes I have! I like films directed by David Ayer. How about you?
[A] I have not what genre is End of Watch
[B] It's a thriller and crime fiction as well.
[A] I will make sure to check it out I like thrillers thank you
[B] Welcome!

[A] Could you recommend any books like The Secret Life of Bees?
[B] Yes, its a great teen book, have you heard about A walk to remember ? It is also a great teen drama
[A] I think I have.. is that one with Hunt Lowry?
[B] yes and he also produced White Oleander and it was released in 1999
[A] Oh, awesome. What genre is that film?
[B] It is film adaption with a melodrama. Do you like Drama movies?
[A] Great! I love drama movies. I'll check this one out then. Thanks so much!
[B] Cool, hope you enjoy. any m ore recommendations you want ?
[A] Whoops, I meant books. I love Drama books! And no, I think that's good. Thanks for your help.
[B] You are welcome

[A] Could you recommend any books by Ken Kesey?
[B] Yes, he wrote One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
[A] Isn't that a movie too?
[B] Yes it sure was it was released in 1975
[A] Who was in that?
[B] In the movie there was Jack Nicholson ,Louise Fletcher

[A] Do you like Michael Jackson?
[B] I do he was very talented and an all around performer. He wrote Dancing on the Dream which is one of my favorites.
[A] Yes, he was very talented indeed. He also won Grammy of the Year, possibly more than once
[B] Yes, Healing the World is one of my favorite songs and the music video was very touching.
[A] Have you ever seen footage of him from a young age. He was such a gifted child
[B] Yes, when he was in Jackson 5. He was on Motown Records

[A] Could you recommend books similar to Dead to the World?
[B] Do you like this book because of it's author Charlaine Harris?
[A] Yes. What other books did she write?
[B] A popular book of her's is the Southern Vampire Mysteries
[A] Thanks for that. I will check out Southern Vampire Mysteries!
[B] Sure thing, hope you enjoy
